generated_oml:
prefix DTDFVocab: https://bentleyjoakes.github.io/DTDF/vocab/DTDFVocab#
prefix base: https://bentleyjoakes.github.io/DTDF/vocab/base#

instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseMosquittoMQTTBroker
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseMosquittoMQTTBroker
]

instance TimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data stored in TimescaleDB for historical analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted, WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, Grafana
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of lab-scale gantry crane created in Autodesk Fusion 360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylib
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory generation of crane movement"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylib
]

instance DockerContainerization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker containerization for deploying digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGeneration, CraneDynamicsSimulation, ContinuousValidation, HistoricalDataLogging, RealTimeVisualization
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing historical data"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLogging
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time data visualization dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualization
]

instance EclipseMosquittoMQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for message transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLogging
]

instance PythonGantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module for gantry crane control and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGeneration, CraneDynamicsSimulation
]

instance ArduinoMicrocontroller : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Microcontroller for sensor measurement and control"
]

instance KiCadHardwareDesign : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "KiCad for hardware design of custom components"
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneDynamicsSimulation
]

instance CraneFrame : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural frame of the lab-scale gantry crane"
]

instance CartMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cart motor controlled by TMC4671-Eval Motor Controller for horizontal movement"
]

instance HoistMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Hoist motor controlled by TMC4671-Eval Motor Controller for vertical movement"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for container pickup"
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryGeneration : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory planning for crane movement using kinematic modeling"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryPlanningInsight
]

instance CraneDynamicsSimulation : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of crane dynamics for virtual commissioning"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultsInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidation : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation comparing real-time measurements with simulations"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionAlert
]

instance HistoricalDataLogging : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logging of historical data to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionAlert
]

instance RealTimeVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data visualization via Grafana dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryPlanningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory planning for crane movement"
]

instance FaultDetectionAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault detection alerts based on validation thresholds"
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization for operational decisions"
]

instance SimulationResultsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results for virtual commissioning and validation"
]

instance GantryCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains CraneFrame, CartMotor, HoistMotor, Electromagnet, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, ArduinoMicrocontroller
]

instance GantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment GantryCraneEnvironment
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., optimal trajectories generated by the Trajectory Generator Service) are sent via the Control Application using the Physical Crane Interface to actuate the Cart Motor, Hoist Motor, and Electromagnet."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization, with data logging and validation occurring without fixed intervals as indicated by 'continuously logs' and 'continuously compares' in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Physical crane components interfaced via Python modules, with digital services (database, dashboard, trajectory generator, simulation, validation) orchestrated through MQTT and Docker containers on a single computer."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated), supporting fault detection, continuous validation, and trajectory optimization during system operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service calculates distance metrics between real measurements and simulated trajectories; breaches of predefined thresholds trigger operator notifications via the dashboard."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto) for inter-service communication between physical and virtual components."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All digital components deployed as Docker containers on a personal computer, managed via Docker Compose."
]
